channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pro-Trans Activists Demonstrate Intimidation Tactics
item.description: A series of concerning incidents at Oxford University.

item.title: Newsweek Criticizes UFC Girls’ Star-Spangled Costumes After Previously Defending Flag Burning
item.description: The outlet’s sudden focus on flag code contrasts with its earlier coverage of actual disrespect toward the flag.

item.title: Former Obama Official Reflects on Effectiveness of Social Security Scare Tactics
item.description: Democrats spent years using fearmongering on entitlement reform, and now face the consequences.

item.title: Pete Buttigieg Endorses Democrats’ Controversial Court-Packing Proposal
item.description: Another high-ranking Democrat backs the party’s extreme plan to expand the Supreme Court with left-leaning justices.
